hero.headline: The studio behind your agency's best work.
hero.sub: growX is a white-label fulfilment studio built specifically for agency owners and solopreneurs who want to deliver more - without the risk of hiring. We handle the execution. You own the relationship.

mission.headline: Agencies shouldn't have to choose between growth and quality.
mission.body:
Most agencies hit a ceiling. You win new business, then burn your team out delivering it. You can't hire fast enough, and contractors introduce more coordination overhead than they remove. So you start turning down work - or worse, delivering work that doesn't reflect your standard.

growX exists to break that ceiling. We're a team of channel specialists - SEO strategists, media buyers, developers, content writers, social managers - who work under your brand or ours, at the quality level your clients expect. No compromise.

founders.name: James Okafor
founders.bio: James spent eight years leading growth at VC-backed SaaS companies before co-founding growX in 2021. He built demand-generation engines that scaled three companies from Series A to exit, and became convinced along the way that most agencies were leaving enormous leverage on the table by trying to hire every capability in-house. growX is his answer to that problem.

founders.name: Lena Park
founders.bio: Lena spent a decade building delivery frameworks for digital agencies and product teams before joining James to co-found growX. Her obsession is operational excellence - she architects the systems, review processes, and communication rhythms that let a lean specialist team consistently outperform much larger generalist agencies.

founders.name: Founder Name
founders.bio: A brief biography about this founder will go here. Describe their background, what led them to co-found growX, and what they bring to the team.

team.name: Riya Sharma
team.bio: 7 years in technical SEO and answer-engine optimisation across SaaS and e-commerce. Led organic growth at two Series B startups and specialises in high-intent keyword architecture.

team.name: Daniel Cruz
team.bio: Managed $14M+ in ad spend across Google, Meta, and TikTok. Former performance lead at a top-50 e-commerce brand, with a specialism in feed-based shopping and UGC creative strategy.

team.name: Amara Diallo
team.bio: Brand strategist turned social specialist. Previously at Ogilvy Social Lab managing accounts for FMCG and fashion clients. Runs influencer campaigns from seeding through to licensing.

team.name: Kira Müller
team.bio: Former editorial director with 200+ SEO-driven articles published across B2B SaaS and fintech verticals. Writes at C-suite level and manages a network of vetted specialist writers.

team.name: Tariq Hassan
team.bio: Full-stack developer with 9 years building on Next.js, React, and headless CMS stacks. Lighthouse score perfectionist. Has shipped over 60 client websites without a single missed deadline.

team.name: Sofia Nguyen
team.bio: Conversion strategist and former head of optimisation at Unbounce. Designs end-to-end funnel architectures and runs A/B programmes that consistently move the revenue needle.

values.title: Quality without compromise
values.description: Every deliverable goes through a peer review before it leaves our hands. We'd rather push a deadline than ship something that doesn't meet the brief.

values.title: Radical transparency
values.description: Daily Slack updates, weekly demos, honest timelines. You always know where the work is - no black box, no chasing for updates.

values.title: Speed without sloppiness
values.description: Proposals in 24 hours. Kick-offs within 48. We move fast because your clients are watching the calendar - but we never cut corners to hit a date.

values.title: Outcome ownership
values.description: We don't track hours, we track results. If something isn't working, we flag it and fix it - proactively, before you have to ask.

approach.headline: Specialists, not generalists.
approach.body:
Every service at growX is handled by a dedicated specialist team - not a project manager juggling ten disciplines. Our SEO team lives and breathes search. Our media buyers manage seven-figure ad budgets. Our developers build exclusively in modern stacks.

We're async-first, which means we work across time zones without the coordination overhead that kills momentum. You get a single point of contact, Slack access to your team, and weekly reviews - not a game of email telephone.

featuredTestimonial.quote: We went from turning away projects to delivering three times more work without a single hire. The quality is indistinguishable from what we'd do in-house. Our clients have no idea.
featuredTestimonial.author: Sarah Chen
featuredTestimonial.title: Founder & CEO, Peak Digital
